description: An agent submits a fully executed purchase agreement. The transaction coordinator must review it and create a new transaction file.

nodes.task_description: Review the purchase agreement for completeness and key dates (acceptance, inspection, closing).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly extracts all critical dates, parties, and the property address from the contract.

nodes.task_description: Create a new transaction in the transaction management system.

expected_outcome.value: A new transaction file is created for the property address with all parties added.

nodes.task_description: Generate a transaction timeline/checklist based on the key dates.

expected_outcome.value: A checklist with all contractual deadlines is created and associated with the transaction.
